title: Remove admin-only restriction — allow any user with username and password to access appointments and feedback dashboard

requirements.summary: Remove the admin-only access restriction from the dashboard. Any user who provides a non-empty username and password should be granted access to view the appointments and feedback sections, without requiring special admin credentials or role checks.
acceptanceCriteria: The login form accepts any non-empty username and password combination
No admin role check or hardcoded admin credentials are enforced on the frontend
After logging in with any non-empty username/password, the user sees the appointments and feedback tabs
The AdminLoginForm component no longer gates access based on admin role verification

file_operations.description: Update the AdminLoginForm component to accept any non-empty username and password combination without performing admin role verification. Remove any hardcoded admin credential checks and ensure the onSuccess callback is triggered for any valid (non-empty) credentials.

Remove admin role checks from the AdminDashboard component. Update the component to show the appointments and feedback tabs to any authenticated user (anyone who has successfully logged in via AdminLoginForm). Remove any backend calls to isCallerAdmin or getCallerUserRole that gate dashboard access. Ensure the dashboard fetches and displays appointments and feedback data for any logged-in user.

Remove or update any React Query hooks that enforce admin-only access checks before fetching appointments or feedback data. Ensure that getAllAppointments, getAllFeedback, and getDashboardData queries can be called by any authenticated user without requiring admin role verification on the frontend.
